records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Administration City Chamber. <color=#ffd34c>Abandoned Mine in Old Colombia</color>, 355m underground.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Administration City Chamber. <color=#ffd34c>Abandoned Mine in Old Colombia</color>, 355m underground.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Administration City Chamber. <color=#ffd34c>Abandoned Mine in Old Colombia</color>, 355m underground.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Elevator deployment and inspection completed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Elevator deployment and inspection completed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Elevator deployment and inspection completed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The recommended stay time is 24 hours. After that, you will be at risk of being infected by Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The recommended stay time is 24 hours. After that, you will be at risk of being infected by Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The recommended stay time is 24 hours. After that, you will be at risk of being infected by Corruption rays.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nice to meet you, Spencer. I'm Oakland from Tomahawk. I'll be your bodyguard for this trip.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nice to meet you, Spencer. I'm Oakland from Tomahawk. I'll be your bodyguard for this trip.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nice to meet you, Spencer. I'm Oakland from Tomahawk. I'll be your bodyguard for this trip.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I saw you taking a smoke break back there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I saw you taking a smoke break back there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I saw you taking a smoke break back there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hate the smell of cigarettes. And so do the residents down there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hate the smell of cigarettes. And so do the residents down there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hate the smell of cigarettes. And so do the residents down there.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Haha
8v Then I'll leave them behind.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Haha
8v Then I'll leave them behind.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Haha
8v Then I'll leave them behind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You the brawny type?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You the brawny type?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You the brawny type?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Leave the heavy lifting to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Leave the heavy lifting to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Leave the heavy lifting to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Load this up in the back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Load this up in the back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Load this up in the back.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Sure
8v? Whoa!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Sure
8v? Whoa!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Sure
8v? Whoa!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is heavy. What is all this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is heavy. What is all this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is heavy. What is all this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Detector parts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Detector parts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Detector parts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Detectors? Were detectors always this big?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Detectors? Were detectors always this big?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Detectors? Were detectors always this big?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anything used where the Corruption ray is strong is bulky and heavy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anything used where the Corruption ray is strong is bulky and heavy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anything used where the Corruption ray is strong is bulky and heavy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Descent complete. Depth check and suit strain level synchronization initiated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Descent complete. Depth check and suit strain level synchronization initiated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Descent complete. Depth check and suit strain level synchronization initiated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whew.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whew.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! What are you doing?! Why are you taking your suit off? We're on the 2nd floor of the Grand Dimension Crevice!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! What are you doing?! Why are you taking your suit off? We're on the 2nd floor of the Grand Dimension Crevice!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! What are you doing?! Why are you taking your suit off? We're on the 2nd floor of the Grand Dimension Crevice!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't sweat it. We're through the descent strain. And there's no risk of being infected as long as your Eternium shield is fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't sweat it. We're through the descent strain. And there's no risk of being infected as long as your Eternium shield is fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't sweat it. We're through the descent strain. And there's no risk of being infected as long as your Eternium shield is fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is reckless. Even a tiny scratch in a place like this could expose you to the Corruption Syndrome.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is reckless. Even a tiny scratch in a place like this could expose you to the Corruption Syndrome.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is reckless. Even a tiny scratch in a place like this could expose you to the Corruption Syndrome.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd rather die than be trapped in that stuffy suit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'd rather die than be trapped in that stuffy suit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd rather die than be trapped in that stuffy suit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, I thought you were gonna protect me, Mr. Bodyguard. Feeling under the weather?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, I thought you were gonna protect me, Mr. Bodyguard. Feeling under the weather?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, I thought you were gonna protect me, Mr. Bodyguard. Feeling under the weather?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... You're not wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... You're not wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... You're not wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'll get the detector set up. You keep a lookout.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'll get the detector set up. You keep a lookout.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'll get the detector set up. You keep a lookout.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't go off for a smoke and wake them up, all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't go off for a smoke and wake them up, all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't go off for a smoke and wake them up, all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: G-got it. Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: G-got it. Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: G-got it. Don't worry.
